entry.title: Venezuela quake death toll passes 4,300 as scale of recovery effort looms large
entry.summary: Nearly 17,000 injured and thousands more listed as missing amid calls by president Delcy Rodríguez and UN for financial help The death toll in Venezuela’s devastating twin earthquakes has passed 4,300, the government said on Saturday. At least 4,333 people were killed and 16,740 injured in the back-to-back quakes on 24 June that flattened entire districts in the coastal state of La Guaira, the Venezuelan parliament chief, Jorge Rodríguez, wrote on Telegram. Thousands more people are listed as missing. Continue reading...
entry.content:
Nearly 17,000 injured and thousands more listed as missing amid calls by president Delcy Rodríguez and UN for financial help The death toll in Venezuela’s devastating twin earthquakes has passed 4,300, the government said on Saturday. At least 4,333 people were killed and 16,740 injured in the back-to-back quakes on 24 June that flattened entire districts in the coastal state of La Guaira, the Venezuelan parliament chief, Jorge Rodríguez, wrote on Telegram. Thousands more people are listed as missing. Continue reading...

entry.title: ゴミを資源として：モザンビークのコミュニティが廃棄物を気候変動対策に転換する方法
entry.summary: モザンビークのコミュニティは、急速な都市化、廃棄物管理の脆弱性、若年層の失業、気候変動への脆弱性に直面し、廃棄物を資源に変えることで環境危機に対処する地元の対応策を開発している。
entry.content:
モザンビークのコミュニティは、急速な都市化、廃棄物管理の脆弱性、若年層の失業、気候変動への脆弱性に直面し、廃棄物を資源に変えることで環境危機に対処する地元の対応策を開発している。

配信元: Global Voices – Africa (Sub-Saharan)
対象国: MZ
カテゴリ: 環境
重要度スコア: 70
